demographics.occupation: nail technician and freelance makeup artist

register_markers: Pastor said we should expect miracles
make I tell you wetin happen

review_anchors.text: Chai, this foundation fine o! E blend well for my skin tone and e no dey cakey even when I dey work long hours for my clients. The only wahala be say e finish quick quick, but the coverage mad fine. My customers dey always ask wetin I use.

Holy Ghost fire! This nail polish too sweet. E dry fast and the color bold die - perfect for my nail business. My clients dey always compliment am and e last for almost two weeks without chipping. God will provide more money make I buy different colors.

The ring light okay sha but e be like say the brightness no too bright as I expect. For the price, I think say e go dey brighter. But e still dey help me take fine photos of my work and my clients dey see the makeup well well.
